title: quercus gambleana
intro: Quercus gambleana, also known as the Himalayan oak, is a deciduous tree species native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its high tannin and flavonoid content, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Quercus gambleana include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Herbal preparations of Quercus gambleana, such as teas and tinctures, can be used to support digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of cold and flu.
